title: lisianthius calciphilus
intro: Lisianthius calciphilus, also known as the calciphilous lisianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lisianthius calciphilus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Lisianthius calciphilus typically involve infusions or decoctions of the roots, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
